title: Squid Game Online
description: Squid Game Online is the ultimate free, multiplayer survival experience inspired by the viral Netflix show. Step into a high-stakes arena with 30 players and compete in seven thrilling mini-games, each directly modeled after the iconic Squid Game Online challenges. In Squid Game Online, you must master games like Red Light, Green Light, Dalgona Candy, Tug of War, and more—where a single mistake leads to instant elimination by the relentless Pink Soldiers. The tension and excitement of Squid Game Online are heightened by immersive soundtracks, competitive multiplayer action, and authentic references to the series. Every round in Squid Game Online is a battle for survival—hone your skills, team up or compete, and see if you can be the last one standing in this intense online adaptation. Whether you’re a fan of the show or seeking your next multiplayer obsession, Squid Game Online promises non-stop action and nail-biting suspense.
howToPlay: 1. Use the WASD or arrow keys to move your character.
2. Press Space to jump over obstacles or gaps.
3. Use the Left Mouse Button (LMB) to interact: scratch the Dalgona cookie, drag the rope, or hit when needed.
4. Press 'E' to pick up weapons in judgment-based games.
5. Drop weapons with 'G' if necessary.
6. Use 'T' to chat with other players in the lobby or in-game.
7. Choose your region and enter a nickname before joining a match.
8. Survive each mini-game by following the specific rules—fail and you'll be eliminated!
9. Outlast all other players to win the round in Squid Game Online.
features: Authentic recreation of Squid Game Online challenges, including Red Light, Green Light, Dalgona Candy, Tug of War, Marbles, and more.
Compete with up to 30 players in real-time multiplayer matches in Squid Game Online.
Progress through seven distinct mini-games true to the Squid Game Online series.

title: Basketball FRVR
description: Enjoy a pure and relaxing shooting experience with Basketball FRVR. This simple-to-learn but engaging basketball game is all about sinking as many shots as you can. In Basketball FRVR, there's no time limit, allowing you to find your rhythm and perfect your shot at your own pace. The challenge comes from the moving basket, which will test the skills of even seasoned players. Aim for a 'swish'—a clean shot that doesn't hit the rim—to earn bonus points. With its clean graphics and smooth, satisfying gameplay, Basketball FRVR is the perfect game to play whenever you have a free moment. Drag to aim, release to shoot, and see how high you can score in Basketball FRVR!
howToPlay: Click and drag the mouse to aim your shot.
Release the mouse button to throw the ball.
Score bonus points for not hitting the rim.
features: Simple and satisfying drag-and-shoot gameplay.
No time limit for a relaxed gaming experience.
The moving basket provides an escalating challenge.
Earn bonus points for making clean 'swish' shots.
Clean, minimalist graphics and smooth animations.
Basketball FRVR is a perfect game for all ages and skill levels.

description: Showcase your shooting skills on a global stage in Basketball Clash, the ultimate multiplayer basketball showdown. In Basketball Clash, your goal is to score more points than your opponent within the time limit. Success requires a combination of agility, precision, and strategic thinking to sink shots from various positions on the court. Rise through the ranks and prove you have what it takes to be among the top 100 shooters worldwide. Do you have the talent to dominate the court and lead your team to triumph in every Basketball Clash?
